concerns.text: Task T026 (CI calculation test) is marked as incomplete [ ]. Spec SC-001 and SC-002 require measuring deviation and power with confidence intervals. Without a completed task for CI calculation testing, the validation of the primary success criteria (SC-001, SC-002) is missing.

Task T027 (Simulation loop orchestration) is marked as incomplete [ ]. FR-004 requires running a simulation loop of at least 10,000 iterations. T027 is the core task implementing this loop. Its absence means the primary data generation for US3 cannot occur.

Task T028 (Checkpointing mechanism) is marked as incomplete [ ]. FR-007 mandates a 6-hour runtime limit. T028 implements the hard stop and checkpointing required to satisfy this constraint. Missing this task risks violating the runtime constraint.

Task T031a (ANOVA on synthetic data) is marked as incomplete [ ]. FR-010 and SC-007 require fitting mixed-effects models for real-world data, but the plan's Complexity Tracking explicitly states ANOVA is required for synthetic data to test scaling method effects. T031a is the only task addressing this for synthetic data; its absence leaves a gap in the analysis plan.

Task T031b (Mixed-effects model for real-world data) is marked as incomplete [ ]. FR-010 explicitly requires fitting mixed-effects models treating dataset as a random effect. T031b is the designated task for this. Its absence means FR-010 cannot be satisfied.

Task T032 (Summary report generation) is marked as incomplete [ ]. SC-004 and SC-006 require comparing deviations and consistency. T032 is the task to generate the summary report containing these comparisons. Missing this task leaves the final validation step unimplemented.

Task T034b (Orchestrate Real-World Dataset Ingestion) is marked as incomplete [ ]. FR-008 requires ingesting at least 10 datasets. T034b implements the loop to iterate over the configuration list. Without it, the ingestion of multiple datasets cannot be automated or verified.

Task T040 (Documentation updates) is marked as incomplete [ ]. The plan requires a quickstart guide. T040 is the task to update `quickstart.md` with the simulation command. Missing this task leaves the user onboarding incomplete.

Task T043 (Additional unit tests for edge cases) is marked as incomplete [ ]. The spec lists specific edge cases (zero variance, infinite values, binning). T043 is the task to implement tests for these. Missing this task leaves critical edge cases untested.

Task T044 (Run quickstart.md validation) is marked as incomplete [ ]. Constitution Principle I requires reproducibility. T044 is the task to validate the quickstart command. Missing this task means the reproducibility check is not performed.

Task T045 (Verify all artifacts) is marked as incomplete [ ]. The plan requires verification of generated figures and reports. T045 is the task to perform this verification. Missing this task leaves the final artifact validation incomplete.

Task T031a description states 'Implement ANOVA analysis... for synthetic data' but the task ID is T031a while T031b is for mixed-effects. The plan's Complexity Tracking section explicitly states 'ANOVA on Aggregated Error Rates' is required for synthetic data and 'Mixed-effects models' for real-world. The task descriptions in T031a and T031b appear to be swapped or misaligned with the plan's architectural decision, causing confusion about which task handles which data type.

Task T031b description states 'Implement mixed-effects model analysis... for real-world data' but the task ID is T031b while T031a is for ANOVA. The plan's Complexity Tracking section explicitly states 'ANOVA on Aggregated Error Rates' is required for synthetic data and 'Mixed-effects models' for real-world. The task descriptions in T031a and T031b appear to be swapped or misaligned with the plan's architectural decision, causing confusion about which task handles which data type.
